3000563.title: The butterfly, the harp, and the timepiece
3000563.description: At a magical pawn shop a vagabond, an office worker, and a former executive reach for the symbols of their waning dreams. Circumstances bind their paths together and lead to a culmination of fulfillment and disappointment.
